title: Finicity application keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don't need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Finicity Application Key detected in variable assignment. Finicity (Mastercard) app keys are used to authenticate API requests for financial data aggregation services including bank account access, transaction history, income verification, and account verification. Exposing this key allows unauthorized access to sensitive consumer financial data, account balances, and personal banking information. Revoke immediately at developer.mastercard.com and audit all API access logs.

Finicity Application Key detected (hex format). Finicity app keys authenticate access to financial data APIs covering bank accounts, transactions, and income data for millions of consumers. Exposing this key enables unauthorized financial data access and potential compliance violations under financial regulations. Revoke immediately and notify affected parties.
